history.text: Kyrgyz Khaganate appears in Kyrgyzstan's historical record.
Kara-Kyrgyz Khanate ruled or strongly influenced the territory before the modern state.
The territory was annexed by the Russian Empire, bringing it under outside rule.
Kara-Kirghiz AO appears in Kyrgyzstan's historical record.
Kirghiz ASSR placed the territory inside the Soviet administrative system.
Kirghiz SSR placed the territory inside the Soviet administrative system.
Kyrgyzstan declared sovereignty, a step toward full independence and international recognition.
Kyrgyzstan declared independence from USSR, beginning the final move toward sovereignty.

worthSeeing.title: Song-Kol Lake:
worthSeeing.text: High-altitude steppe lake surrounded by nomad yurt camps and wild horses.

worthSeeing.title: Tian Shan Mountains:
worthSeeing.text: Dramatic peaks, glaciers, and remote valleys across one of Asia's greatest mountain ranges.

worthSeeing.title: Ala-Archa National Park:
worthSeeing.text: Stunning glacial gorge just outside Bishkek with trekking and mountaineering.

planningQuestions.a: Song-Kol Lake, Tian Shan Mountains, Ala-Archa National Park.

planningQuestions.q: How should I browse it here?
planningQuestions.a: Start with the facts, jump to linked cities, then check events and topics.
